overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through the Watson district of Night City. The scene features futuristic architecture including a massive cylindrical tower, elevated highways, commercial establishments such as a gas station and burger restaurant, with moderate pedestrian and vehicle activity under clear midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban intersection with gas station and elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking along the city street, navigating around pedestrians and observing the futuristic architecture

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white tank top and sunglasses walking toward camera
futuristic silver sedan driving along the street

entered.detail: tall cylindrical skyscraper with the number 06 displayed prominently near the top, featuring industrial lighting rigs
curved elevated roadway structure arching over the street with metallic supports
futuristic fuel station with green and yellow neon trim, spherical storage tanks, and covered pump areas
large holographic advertisement displaying a woman's face with blue eye makeup and text
street sign with teal background indicating Watson district
silver armored vehicle with cylindrical tanks parked on the street side

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit futuristic city street with a massive tower dominating the background. The camera moves forward past an armored truck on the left toward a gas station on the right, with holographic billboards and elevated highways visible overhead. Pedestrians walk along the sidewalks and futuristic vehicles drive along the multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk along commercial street with pedestrian overpass

events.description: camera turns right to follow a pedestrian in a brown coat onto the sidewalk
passing under the elevated pedestrian walkway structure, changing the overhead spatial layout

agents.ego_description: turning right onto the sidewalk and following a pedestrian in a brown coat and blue beanie, maintaining a steady walking pace

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown coat and blue beanie walking ahead of camera
pedestrian in white dress walking past camera in the opposite direction

entered.detail: metal grated walkway structure with curved supports crossing over the street
concrete barrier with painted American flag design and 666th Street text
tall digital sign showing fuel prices with illuminated FUEL text

segments.scene_description: The character turns right onto a tiled sidewalk, following a pedestrian in a brown coat. The camera passes under a metal pedestrian overpass and continues past a concrete barrier painted with the 666th Street sign. The gas station remains visible on the right, now closer, with its fuel price display becoming prominent.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with fast food restaurant and gas station

events.description: waiting for a black SUV to pass before continuing along the sidewalk
slight turn to navigate around pedestrians gathered on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past the gas station, approaching a burger restaurant with a large rotating holographic burger sign

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white crop top and shorts walking toward camera
black SUV driving past on the street

entered.detail: green building with large rotating holographic burger sign on top and yellow neon text
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk near the gas station entrance
small market stalls with colorful umbrellas visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the commercial sidewalk, the camera approaches a burger restaurant with a distinctive giant holographic burger sign. The gas station remains visible but recedes to the mid-ground while palm trees line the walkway. The character navigates around oncoming pedestrians and waits for traffic to clear.

scene_state.functional_zone: fast food restaurant front with outdoor seating and industrial backdrop

events.description: approaching the entrance of the burger restaurant with outdoor seating visible
large holographic burger sign temporarily blocks view of the mega tower

agents.ego_description: walking past the burger restaurant, observing the large holographic signage and outdoor seating area before continuing down the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians walking together on the sidewalk ahead
person standing near the burger restaurant entrance looking at the building

entered.detail: tall industrial smokestack with steam rising, visible behind the commercial buildings

segments.scene_description: The final segment focuses on the burger restaurant as the camera passes directly by it, revealing the detailed facade and outdoor seating. The mega tower shifts to the left side of the frame while an industrial chimney becomes visible in the distance. The character continues walking past pedestrians and the restaurant entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit futuristic city street that transitions from a wide urban vista into a detailed commercial walkway. It begins by moving forward past an armored truck toward a gas station, with a massive tower dominating the background beneath elevated highways and holographic billboards. As the camera turns right onto a tiled sidewalk, it follows a pedestrian under a metal overpass and passes a concrete barrier marked with a street sign while the gas station's fuel display becomes prominent. The scene then shifts toward a burger restaurant featuring a giant holographic sign, with the gas station receding into the mid-ground as palm trees line the path. Finally, the camera passes directly by the restaurant's facade and outdoor seating, shifting the mega tower to the left of the frame to reveal an industrial chimney in the distance.
